description.deletion: Possible error on the server. Please describe your problem to the Support.
description.imageUpload: An image should be jpeg or png, and also less then 3Mb.

creation.title: Error while creating the text block
creation.text: Possible software error. When I clicked on the add text block button, an error message appeared. [Please describe in detail what you did before that!]

deletion.title: Error while deleting the text block
deletion.text: Possible server error. When I tried to delete the text block, an error message appeared. [Please describe in detail what you did before that!]

imageUpload.title: An error while uploading an image
imageUpload.text: Possible server error. An error appeared while uploading an image. [Please describe an image extension, it's size and steps that led you there!]

description.creation: Possible problem in the application. Please describe your problem to the Support.
description.saving: Possible error on the server. Please describe your problem to the Support.
description.deletion: Possible error on the server. Please describe your problem to the Support.

creation.title: Error while creating a Wiki
creation.text: Possible software error. When I clicked on the create Wiki button, an error message appeared. [Please describe in detail what you did before that!]

saving.title: Error while saving the Wiki
saving.text: Possible software error. While changing and saving the Wiki an error message appeared. [Please describe in detail what you did before that!]

deletion.title: Error while deleting the Wiki
deletion.text: Possible server error. When I tried to delete the Wiki, an error message appeared. [Please describe in detail what you did before that!]

description.deletion: We made a mistake and something went wrong. We really apologise for that! Please try to delete in a while or contact Support. We will try to fix it as soon as possible.

deletion.title: Error while deleting an image
deletion.text: Possible mistake on the server. After clicking "Delete and image" the error notification appeared. [Please describe your previous actions as much as you can!]

error.initializingDescription: Structure creation is not finished. Write to support@writex.com try in a while.

text.paragraph1: There are a lot of techniques, helping in creation story structure, like original <0>technique "Story Spine"</0>.
text.paragraph2: In general all stories has the same <0>Story Lifecycle</0>. You can create each of Lifecycle Steps (or be more granular, add Chapters instead of Lifecycle Steps or anything else that will work for you) and later add text and details, using the Spine.

creating.nameInputLabel: Enter first Spine Item name here
creating.nameInputDescription: You can add just several Spine Items. the rest you can add later.
creating.nameInputPlaceholder: For example, "Once upon a time" or "Chapter 1. Protagonist born."
creating.interfaceExample: In the interface it will look like this

text.paragraph1: You can create one or several text versions. You can add more versions later.
text.paragraph2: <0>Main idea</0>. With each new Text Version you add details, copy and rewrite some parts or your previous Text Versions. After some iterations you will be reaching to the final version of your text.

text.paragraph1: Create Wiki Section (or Knowledge Base) helps to collect information you need to create holistic history.
text.paragraph3: <1>Advice</1>. Don't store all information in one Wiki Section. Catalog information, create different Wiki Sections for different types of information or it's granularity.
text.paragraph4: <1>Example</1>. Separate Wiki Section for <0>Main Characters</0>, separate for <0>Secondary</0>. If you have world descriptions, you can create Wiki <0>Global Geography</0>. If you have places in City X, then Wiki Section <0>City X</0>, and so on.
text.paragraph5: No need to create everything now. You can create new Wiki Section at <0>any moment</0>.

editor.emptyBlocks: Add text block or image by clicking on buttons below
editor.emptyWikis: Add a new Wiki by clicking on button below.

names.empty: Add alternative names, which occur in texts.

management.newHeader: Enter name, choose type and click Create.

type.bondDescription: If you need to rewrite or change text, but don't want to delete an old version. Examples: Draft, Final, For Publisher.
type.wikiDescription: If you want to supplement the knowledge base, but want to have more precise categorisation. Examples: Antagonists, Cities, Places in City X.

scrollSync.label: Scroll sync
scrollSync.description: If active, then scroll will by synced with other text versions

moveMode.label: Move mode
moveMode.description: If active, you can use your cursor to drag and sort your text blocks
moveMode.symbolsQuantity: Symbols quantity shown in the text block

markWikis.label: Mark Wikis
markWikis.description: If active, all entries of Wikis will be marked in text; use ⌘ + click to open the Wiki.

spellCheck.label: Spell check
spellCheck.description: If active, potential mistakes will be marked in the text; move text cursor on it to open description.

ageReadability.label: Readability for age
ageReadability.description: If active, if text is hard readable, it will be marked with gradient from light to dark red.

exclude.label: Don't mark
exclude.description: do not include Wiki in the search and don't mark in texts

medium.generalInfo: To export this vertical we need Medium <0>integration token</0>.
medium.officialInfo: This is an <0>official way</0> of integration with Medium.

integrationSteps.2: Choose <0>Integration tokens</0> in the menu on the left.
integrationSteps.4: Copy <0>generated token</0> and paste it in the field below.

medium.linkError: Something went wrong. Please make sure that you've copied all symbols of integration token and start with <0>step 4</0>. If it didn't help then try to generate a new token (<0>step 3</0>).

export.error: Something went wrong. Please make sure that you've entered correct article name. If error will occur, please notify our <0>tech support</0>.
